message: Server does not expose the stateless server/discover RPC.
detail: Probe discover returned JSON-RPC error code -32601.
remediation: Implement server/discover with supported versions, server capabilities, and server identity.

message: Legacy initialize handshake is not the MCP 2026-07-28 stateless path.
detail: Legacy initialize succeeded on an isolated stdio process after server/discover failed.
remediation: Carry protocol version, client info, and client capabilities in per-request _meta and expose server/discover.

message: Request is missing per-request client identity or capabilities.
detail: Server accepted read-only stdio tools/list with no per-request _meta.

message: Cacheable result is missing ttlMs or cacheScope.
detail: tools/list stdio response was accepted but did not include both ttlMs and cacheScope.
remediation: Return ttlMs and cacheScope on list/read results covered by the 2026-07-28 changelog.

message: Cacheable result is missing ttlMs or cacheScope.
detail: resources/list stdio response was accepted but did not include both ttlMs and cacheScope.
remediation: Return ttlMs and cacheScope on list/read results covered by the 2026-07-28 changelog.

message: Cacheable result is missing ttlMs or cacheScope.
detail: prompts/list stdio response was accepted but did not include both ttlMs and cacheScope.
remediation: Return ttlMs and cacheScope on list/read results covered by the 2026-07-28 changelog.
